module.name: configs/recommended
module.description: Factory that creates the recommended flat ESLint config preset with warn-level rule enforcement.

scenarios.name: should return a flat config with the correct name
scenarios.given: a plugin instance is passed to createRecommendedConfig

scenarios.name: should register the supplied plugin under the zero-tolerance namespace
scenarios.given: a plugin instance is passed to createRecommendedConfig
scenarios.when: the returned config's plugins record is inspected
scenarios.then: it contains the plugin under the key 'zero-tolerance'

scenarios.name: should include warn-level rules from the recommended preset
scenarios.given: a plugin instance is passed to createRecommendedConfig
scenarios.when: the returned config's rules record is inspected
